'''鈭歬-zh-zh''' ('''kakazhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knaw|knaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knaw|knaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhazh|thikazhazh]] || [[word:jikazhazh|jikazhazh]] || [[word:shikazhazh|shikazhazh]] || [[word:kikazhazh|kikazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhazh|thuthukazhazh]] || [[word:jujukazhazh|jujukazhazh]] || [[word:shushukazhazh|shushukazhazh]] || [[word:kukukazhazh|kukukazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazhazh|thukazhazh]] || [[word:jukazhazh|jukazhazh]] || [[word:shukazhazh|shukazhazh]] || [[word:kukazhazh|kukazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazhazh|thukazhazh]] || [[word:jukazhazh|jukazhazh]] || [[word:shukazhazh|shukazhazh]] || [[word:kukazhazh|kukazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazhazh|thekazhazh]] || [[word:jekazhazh|jekazhazh]] || [[word:shekazhazh|shekazhazh]] || [[word:kekazhazh|kekazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazhazh|thothokazhazh]] || [[word:jojokazhazh|jojokazhazh]] || [[word:shoshokazhazh|shoshokazhazh]] || [[word:kokokazhazh|kokokazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazhazh|thokazhazh]] || [[word:jokazhazh|jokazhazh]] || [[word:shokazhazh|shokazhazh]] || [[word:kokazhazh|kokazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhazh|thokazhazh]] || [[word:jokazhazh|jokazhazh]] || [[word:shokazhazh|shokazhazh]] || [[word:kokazhazh|kokazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kazhazh|th忙kazhazh]] || [[word:j忙kazhazh|j忙kazhazh]] || [[word:sh忙kazhazh|sh忙kazhazh]] || [[word:k忙kazhazh|k忙kazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazhazh|thathakazhazh]] || [[word:jajakazhazh|jajakazhazh]] || [[word:shashakazhazh|shashakazhazh]] || [[word:kakakazhazh|kakakazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazhazh|thakazhazh]] || [[word:jakazhazh|jakazhazh]] || [[word:shakazhazh|shakazhazh]] || [[word:kakazhazh|kakazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakazhazh|thakazhazh]] || [[word:jakazhazh|jakazhazh]] || [[word:shakazhazh|shakazhazh]] || [[word:kakazhazh|kakazhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakazhazh|shakazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakazhazh|goshakazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakazhazh|gokishakazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakazhazhn眉|shakazhazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkn眉|goshakazhazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhn眉|gokishakazhazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakazhazhsh毛|shakazhazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnksh毛|goshakazhazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhsh毛|gokishakazhazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhazhro|shakazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkro|goshakazhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhro|gokishakazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhazhmu|shakazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkmu|goshakazhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhmu|gokishakazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakazhazhsher|shakazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnksher|goshakazhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhsher|gokishakazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakazhazhng|shakazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkng|goshakazhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhng|gokishakazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakazhazhya|shakazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkya|goshakazhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhya|gokishakazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakazhazhyam|shakazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkyam|goshakazhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhyam|gokishakazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhazhn眉sh毛|shakazhazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkn眉sh毛|goshakazhazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhn眉sh毛|gokishakazhazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhazhn眉ro|shakazhazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkn眉ro|goshakazhazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhn眉ro|gokishakazhazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhazhn眉mu|shakazhazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkn眉mu|goshakazhazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhn眉mu|gokishakazhazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhazhsh毛n眉|shakazhazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnksh毛n眉|goshakazhazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhsh毛n眉|gokishakazhazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhazhsh毛ro|shakazhazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnksh毛ro|goshakazhazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhsh毛ro|gokishakazhazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhazhsh毛mu|shakazhazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnksh毛mu|goshakazhazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhsh毛mu|gokishakazhazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhazhron眉|shakazhazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkron眉|goshakazhazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhron眉|gokishakazhazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhazhrosh毛|shakazhazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkrosh毛|goshakazhazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhrosh毛|gokishakazhazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhazhromu|shakazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkromu|goshakazhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhromu|gokishakazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhazhmun眉|shakazhazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkmun眉|goshakazhazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhmun眉|gokishakazhazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhazhmush毛|shakazhazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkmush毛|goshakazhazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhmush毛|gokishakazhazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhazhmuro|shakazhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhazhnkmuro|goshakazhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhazhmuro|gokishakazhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
